name: open_listing
_note: inheritance.open_listing (server.js MACROS path) INSERTs a heir-slot market listing with a CC price into inheritance_market_listings. MONEY-PATH GUARD (landed 2026-06-27): heirSlotPriceCc now fails CLOSED before the INSERT (a finite-absurd 1e308 / non-finite Infinity|NaN / negative / >1e6 rejects as invalid_numeric:heirSlotPriceCc) so no poisoned CC obligation can be persisted. currency is always 'CC'. The sibling claim_slot macro takes only a listingId and moves no CC at claim time (resolves on NPC death), so it needs no numeric guard.
